narrative: Iran seizes cargo ships in Strait of Hormuz — safe-haven bid into JPY and CHF; USD/JPY retreats to 159.23; gold higher +1.25%; VIX at 19.2. ECB's Simkus comments on no rate hike in April influence EUR/USD at 1.1747; Fed-BoJ 450bp differential sustains USD/JPY carry. Watch BoJ meeting Apr 28 for potential policy shift.
